ai_summary: Hexagon Nutrition Limited announced the resignation of two directors, including Executive Director Mr. Subhash Purushottam Kelkar and Non-Executive Director Mr. Aditya Kelkar, effective July 6, 2026. These resignations are a direct consequence of their complete shareholding divestment as selling shareholders in the company's recently concluded IPO, signifying a full exit of foundational ownership and leadership. While stated as a planned transition with non-compete agreements in place, this simultaneous departure post-IPO warrants attention as a potential yellow flag regarding the long-term commitment of early key stakeholders.
